name: Deshi Shahi Cow
description: This healthy Deshi cow is well-raised in a natural farm environment and fed with organic food. It has a strong body structure, good weight, and is ideal for Qurbani purposes. The animal is active, disease-free, and properly maintained with regular care.

name: Black Bengal Goat
description: This premium quality Black Bengal goat is well-known for its excellent meat quality and compact size. It has been raised in a healthy environment with proper nutrition. Perfect for small families looking for a manageable and high-quality Qurbani animal.

name: Sahiwal Cow
description: This Sahiwal cow is a high-quality breed known for its strength, durability, and excellent body structure. It has been carefully raised with proper feeding and hygiene. The cow is calm in nature, healthy, and suitable for both Qurbani and farming purposes.

name: Red Chittagong Cow
description: This Red Chittagong cow is a popular local breed known for its adaptability and strong health. It has a well-balanced body, is properly fed, and maintained under hygienic conditions. A great choice for Qurbani due to its good weight and condition.

name: Jamunapari Goat
description: This Jamunapari goat is a large and attractive breed known for its height and strong body. It has been raised with high-quality feed and proper care. The goat is healthy, active, and an excellent option for Qurbani due to its size and appearance.

name: Deshi Khassi
description: This Deshi Khassi is raised in a natural rural environment with fresh grass and nutritious feed. It is healthy, active, and well-maintained. Ideal for Qurbani, especially for smaller families looking for a quality animal at a reasonable price.

name: Holstein Friesian Bull
description: This Holstein Friesian bull is an imported high-yield breed known for its large size and strong physique. It has been raised with premium feed and proper veterinary care. The bull is healthy, impressive in appearance, and perfect for large-scale Qurbani.

name: Boer Goat
description: This Boer goat is a premium meat breed known for its fast growth and high meat production. It has been raised with proper care, balanced nutrition, and a clean environment. A great option for buyers looking for a high-quality Qurbani animal.

name: Local Dairy Cow
description: This local dairy cow is suitable for both milk production and Qurbani. It has been raised in a healthy environment with proper feeding and regular care. The cow is active, disease-free, and known for its steady milk production capacity.

name: Mini Goat
description: This mini goat is small in size but healthy and well-maintained. It is raised with proper nutrition and care in a clean environment. Perfect for small families or limited space, and a budget-friendly option for Qurbani.

name: Australian Cross Cow
description: This Australian cross cow is known for its strong build and excellent meat quality. Raised with premium feed and proper veterinary supervision, it is healthy, active, and suitable for large Qurbani arrangements.

name: Hybrid Goat
description: This hybrid goat combines the qualities of multiple breeds, offering good size, healthy growth, and quality meat. It is well-maintained, properly fed, and a great choice for medium-sized families during Qurbani.
